description.value: Categories of payment amounts associated with a claim based on their source, destination, or method of payment. These codes represent components of financial settlement and are distinct from adjudication outcome categories (e.g., allowed, paid) and adjudication basis factors.

copyright.value: This material derives from the HL7 Terminology (THO). THO is copyright ©1989+ Health Level Seven International and is made available under the CC0 designation. For more licensing information see: https://terminology.hl7.org/license

definition.value: The amount paid by a prior payer, typically reflected in coordination of benefits and used to reduce the current payer’s liability.
The total amount paid by the patient from any or all sources.
The amount paid by the patient using cash, check, or other personal funds not associated with a health account.
The amount paid by the patient using a health account. (These are often tax-advantaged account such as a Health Savings Account)
The amount paid by the patient using a method not other than cash (cash, check, or personal account) or health account.
The amount disbursed to the provider for services or products rendered.
The amount disbursed directly to the patient.
